days.text: Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, becoming northerlies with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 2 to 4 northerly winds, becoming easterlies with gusts.
